hero.subhead: For veterans, civilians, and refugees who have lived through war, we offer evidence-based trauma care, belonging, and a path forward — built on two decades of clinical research and human dignity.

mission.statement: War leaves wounds the eye cannot see. We exist to heal them — with rigor, reverence, and the long patience that recovery requires.
mission.supporting: The War Survivors Institute is an independent nonprofit dedicated to the treatment of trauma caused by armed conflict. Drawing on more than twenty years of clinical practice and peer-reviewed research, we serve those most often overlooked — and train the clinicians, communities, and institutions around them.

stats.label: Survivors served
stats.description: Across clinical, community, and telehealth programs since 2004.

stats.label: Countries reached
stats.description: Partnerships spanning North America, Europe, the Middle East, and East Africa.

stats.label: Clinicians trained
stats.description: In trauma-informed, evidence-based care through our professional fellowship.

stats.label: Candid Seal, 2024
stats.description: Independent recognition for transparency, financial health, and mission impact.
